newsArray.title: SA20 2027 Schedule, Fixtures | SA20 T20 2027 Match Time Table, Venue | 2027 SA20 Teams, Squads, Players List, Captain
newsArray.description: Get the South Africa's SA20 2027 Schedule, Full Fixtures, Match Time Table and Venue details along with Squads, Players List and Captain only on Indiacricketschedule.com The SA20 2027 (known as the Betway SA20 T20 League 2027, CSA T20 League 2027 ) a Twenty20 cricket league organized by the Cricket South Africa (CSA). The Tournament will be held from Sunday, January 17, 2027 to Sunday, February 21, 2027 It will be the fifth season of the SA20 and 6 franchises team are participants in the SA20 . The player auction for the fifth season of the SA20 will be held in Johannesburg on September-October 2026. Franchises allowed up to six retentions for SA20 auction. 2027 Schedule 2027 Squads 2027 Points Table SA20 2027 Details [3] Dates: January 17, 2027 to February 21, 2027 [2] Administrator(s): Cricket South Africa (CSA) Cricket format: Twenty20 Tournament format(s):: Round-robin and playoffs Host(s): South Africa Participants: 6 Matches played: 34 Champions Player of the series Most runs Most wickets Website sa20.co.za SA20 2027 Schedule, Full Match Fixtures and Time Table SA20 Season 5 will be held from January 17 to February 21, 2027 Sunday, January 17, 2027 7:00 PM (IST) 1:30 PM (GMT) | 3:30 PM (Local) SEC vs PC, 1st Match , SA20 Season 5 • St George's Park, Gqeberha Sunrisers Eastern Cape Pretoria Capitals Squads for SA20 2027 | SA20 2027 All Teams Players List and Captain Note, this is the squad for the 2026 season. This squad may change after the 2027 auction. MI Cape Town Joburg Super Kings Paarl Royals Pretoria Capitals Sunrisers Eastern Cape Durban's Super Giants Nicholas Pooran (captain) Corbin Bosch Trent Boult Rashid Khan George Linde Nicholas Pooran Kagiso Rabada Rassie van der Dussen Ryan Rickelton Reeza Hendricks Dwaine Pretorius Tristan Luus Jason Smith Tom Moores Dane Piedt Tiaan van Vuuren Dan Lategan Tabraiz Shamsi Karim Janat Jacques Snyman Faf du Plessis (Captain) Richard Gleeson Akeal Hosein James Vince Donovan Ferreira Wiaan Mulder Nandre Burger Prenelan Subrayen Dian Forrester Steve Stolk Janco Smit Neil Timmers Shubham Ranjane Brandon King Rilee Rossouw Rivaldo Moonsamy Imran Tahir Reece Topley Lhuan-dre Pretorius Bjorn Fortuin David Miller Sikandar Raza Mujeeb Ur Rahman Rubin Hermann Ottniel Baartman Gudakesh Motie Delano Potgieter Kyle Verreynne Keagan Lion-Cachet Asa Tribe Hardus Viljoen Jacob Johannes Basson Dan Lawrence Eshan Malinga Nqobani Mokoena Vishen Halambage Nqaba Peter Sherfane Rutherford Andre Russell Keshav Maharaj Lungi Ngidi Dewald Brevis Lizaad Williams Craig Overton Saqib Mahmood Codi Yusuf Connor Esterhuizen Bryce Parsons Gideon Peters Junaid Dawood Will Smeed Meeka-eel Prince Bayanda Majola Wihan Lubbe Sibonelo Makhanya Tristan Stubbs Jonny Bairstow Adam Milne AM Ghazanfar Marco Jansen Quinton de Kock Matthew Breetzke Anrich Nortje Senuran Muthusamy Patrick Kruger Lutho Sipamla Mitchell Van Buuren Jordan Hermann Beyers Swanepoel James Coles Chris Wood Lewis Gregory CJ King JP King Noor Ahmad Sunil Narine Jos Buttler Heinrich Klaasen Aiden Markram Kwena Maphaka Devon Conway Gerald Coetzee David Bedingham Marques Ackerman Eathan Bosch Andile Simelane Tony de Zorzi Dayyaan Galiem Taijul Islam Evan Jones Gysbert Wege David Wiese Daryn Dupavillon References "2027 SA20" . sa20.co.za. newsArray.title: LPL 2026: Jaffna Kings terminated mid-season after co-owner's arrest and corruption allegations
newsArray.description: Jaffna Kings will compete in the 2026 Lanka Premier League season. This follows their ownership rights termination by Sri Lanka Cricket and IPG. Organizers have assumed operational control to ensure tournament continuity. Player contracts and logistics are now managed directly by IPG and SLC. The team will continue under the same name and with its current squad.
creator: toi sports desk
